metadata.title: TreasuryFlow
metadata.description: A finance operations platform for payout approvals, settlements, and transaction oversight

home.title: A polished starting point for your customer web experience
home.description: This scaffold combines a public marketing surface, authenticated dashboard flows, locale-aware routing, and Cloudflare-ready deployment.
home.marketingBody: The structure is inspired by the Ingredish client app: locale-aware routes, an authenticated dashboard shell, and a same-origin backend proxy.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Choose a sign-in method for the user web app.
login.noMethods: No user login methods were selected in the template yet.

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.description: Use this shell for user-facing product features such as home, examples, recipes, shopping, or profile settings.
dashboard.examplesBody: Connect generated TypeScript API clients or route handlers here.
dashboard.profileBody: Add account, subscription, and user settings flows in this slice.
